====Pokémon Adventures====
[[File:Red Adventures.png|thumb|200px|Red in Pokémon Adventures]]
{{main|Red (Adventures)}}
Red appears in [[Pokémon Adventures]], and also appeared in a fantasy in [[Pokémon Ranger the Comic: Double Mission]]. Like his game counterpart, he's a boy from [[Pallet Town]] who helps take down [[Team Rocket]] and becomes a {{pkmn|Champion|Pokémon League Champion}} after defeating his [[rival]] {{adv|Blue}} at the [[Indigo Plateau]].
